title: TokenizeRequest
description: Request body for the generic tokenize endpoint.

stopwordPresets.description: Optional user-defined named stopword presets. Shape matches InvertedIndexConfig.stopwordPresets on a collection: each key is a preset name, each value is a plain list of stopwords. A preset name that matches a built-in ('en', 'none') fully replaces the built-in. Preset names must not be empty or whitespace-only; each word list must contain at least one word; individual words must not be empty or whitespace-only. Mutually exclusive with stopwords — pass one or the other, not both.
